title: Ceciliyan strives  with continuous  all-time record prices
body_lines: Ceciliyan Tea Factory once again have achieved an all-time record price of Rs. 2350
for a low grown PEKOE DUST at this week’s tea auction held on 13/15 June.
Ceciliyan Tea Factory is located in the hills of Kalawana region in the Ratnapura district and this factory is managed by Ceciliyan Associates Ltd.

Ceciliyan Tea Factory is well recognised for manufacturing quality teas and more often they obtain premium prices for their teas at the weekly auctions. It possesses ISO 22000 certificate and has won several awards for its quality manufacture and ethical practices.
This line of tea was marketed by Mercantile Produce Tea Brokers Ltd. and was purchased by Uniworld Teas Ltd.
